summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quote Templates, Email Composer, and Duplicate Quote features. All requested features are implemented and working correctly.

minor.issue: Email sending may fail for non-owner emails due to Resend domain verification (external service limitation, not code bug)

seed_data_creation: Test template 'Wedding Photography Package' already existed. Used existing lead with 14 quotes for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three features (Quote Templates, Email Composer, Duplicate Quote) are fully implemented and working. The Email Composer uses react-quill for rich text editing. Templates are loaded from /api/quote-templates and sorted alphabetically. Duplicate Quote creates a copy with DRAFT status and logs it in activity history.

Quote Templates: Load Template button appears in Quote Builder modal
Loading template pre-fills 4 line items with pricing
Shows 'Loaded template: Wedding Photography Package' success message
Save as Template button opens modal with name/description inputs
Email Composer: Email button visible in Lead Detail Modal header (next to X close button)
Modal header shows 'Email [Client Name]' and project title
Rich text editor with formatting toolbar (B, I, U, lists, link)
Quick Insert buttons: Client Name, Project Title, Portal Link
Duplicate Quote: Menu dropdown with MoreHorizontal (three dots) icon on each quote card
Menu options: View Quote, Download PDF, Copy Link, Duplicate, Delete
Duplicate creates new quote with DRAFT status
Activity log shows: 'Quote Q-2026-014 created (duplicated from Q-2026-013)'
